title: artemisia tridentata var. bolanderi
intro: Artemisia tridentata var. bolanderi, also known as Bolander's sagebrush, is a shrub that is a variety of the Great Basin sagebrush plant (Artemisia tridentata). This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Bolander's sagebrush are said to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Bolander's sagebrush can be prepared into teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile herb in traditional herbal medicine.
